description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a sprawling layout, featuring multiple interconnected rectangular volumes and flat roofs. The property includes a prominent swimming pool with a central fountain, a circular hot tub, and a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture. The front of the house has a wide driveway leading to a multi-car garage, landscaped with shrubs and decorative bushes. Large windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in light beige tones, with some areas accented by darker surfaces and glass railings. Additional features include a helipad, a small gazebo, and a fenced area, suggesting luxury and versatility in urban or suburban settings.
description: A large, modern luxury house with flat roofs, a swimming pool, multi-car garage, and extensive outdoor amenities. The exterior is light beige with large windows and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, swimming pool with fountain, hot tub, and patio furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, gazebo, and the full length of the house with visible garage and driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway, garage, landscaped entry path, and helipad on the roof.
description_view_3: Back and side view showing the interconnected building volumes, pool area, and additional outdoor features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main entry with steps, a paved walkway, landscaped borders, and a large modern door; no porch or columns.
